Mid-20s, medium build, medium complexion, curly black hair, slight mustache.
Mid-20s, slim build, medium complexion, short black hair. Wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeve shirt and dark pants.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long wavy dark hair. Wears a small bindi.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अब हँसो मेरी English पर! कुछ हफ़्तों से इस app पर हूँ, now I can speak better English than you guys. [Now laugh at my English! I've been on this app for a few weeks, now I can speak better English than you guys.]
Character C says: सच में? Wow, very fluent English! [Really? Wow, very fluent English!]
Character B says: ये कौन सा app है भाई? [Which app is this, bro?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable social dynamic (friends being surprised by sudden improvement).
- Establishes the core problem: feeling insecure about English among peers.
- Removes the unrealistic "15 days" claim, replacing it with a more believable "few weeks" of practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अब हँसो मेरी English पर! now I can speak better English than you guys. सच में? Wow, very fluent English! ये कौन सा app है भाई?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova app, ये एक AI English tutor app है, जो हमें confidently English बोलना सिखाता है। [Supernova app, this is an AI English tutor app that teaches us to speak English confidently.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the brand name and core product offering.
- Positions the app as an AI tutor rather than just a generic teaching app.
- Sets a practical, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova app, ये एक AI English tutor app है

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: जब तुम लोग time waste कर रहे थे, मैं daily 10-15 minute English बोलने की practice कर रही थी। [While you guys were wasting time, I was practicing speaking English for 10-15 minutes daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the low daily time commitment needed for success.
- Emphasizes the importance of active speaking practice over passive learning.
- Reinforces the "older sibling" tone of practical discipline.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मैं daily 10-15 minute English बोलने की practice कर रही थी।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसमें AI teacher है, तो बोलते वक़्त mistakes करने का कोई डर नहीं। जो भी गलती करो, ये बिना judge किये तुरंत correct कर देता है। ये देखो... [It has an AI teacher, so there's no fear of making mistakes while speaking. Whatever mistake you make, it corrects immediately without judging. Look at this...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the primary psychological barrier: fear of judgment when speaking.
- Explains the core feature: immediate, non-judgmental AI correction.
- Transitions smoothly into the product demonstration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: बोलते वक़्त mistakes करने का कोई डर नहीं। जो भी गलती करो, ये बिना judge किये तुरंत correct कर देता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Hello ma'am, हमें भी English बोलना सीखना है। [Hello ma'am, we also want to learn to speak English.]
Character D says: बिलकुल! अपने free time में मेरे साथ English बोलने की practice शुरू करो। रोज़ practice करोगे तो तुम्हारी English भी बहुत जल्द confident हो जाएगी। [Absolutely! Start practicing speaking English with me in your free time. If you practice daily, your English will also become confident very soon.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the AI avatar in action, demonstrating its conversational capability.
- Replaces the aggressive "fluent in 15-20 days" claim with a realistic promise of building confidence through daily practice.
- Encourages users to utilize their free time productively.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hello ma'am, हमें भी English बोलना सीखना है। बिलकुल! अपने free time में मेरे साथ practice शुरू करो।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Wow, ये AI Teacher तो बहुत बढ़िया है, मुझे भी ऐसी English बोलनी है। [Wow, this AI Teacher is really good, I also want to speak English like this.]
Character A says: इस app से मेरा confidence एकदम बढ़ गया है, office में भी सब respect करते हैं। आज ही Supernova download करो। [This app has really boosted my confidence, everyone respects me at the office too. Download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: gaining respect at work and boosting self-confidence.
- Provides strong social proof from the friends.
- Ends with a clear, direct Call to Action (CTA) for Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Wow, ये AI Teacher तो बहुत बढ़िया है! मेरा confidence एकदम बढ़ गया है। आज ही Supernova download करो।
